_comment: EXAMPLE / SCHEMA ONLY — placeholder handles. The REAL registry lives at /root/mandrel-registry.json (chmod 600, LOCAL ONLY, NEVER committed: it holds customer handles). This file documents the schema that scripts/provision-instance.sh reads + writes. Onboarding model: labels-only behind nginx wildcard *.mandrel.ridgetopai.net -> Traefik 127.0.0.1:8090 (Docker-label routing); ports auto-allocated from the ranges below.

reserved_ports._comment: Ports pinned by convention (e.g. the staging canary anchored at the top of every range) that must NOT be auto-allocated to a new handle.

demo._note: status=suspended means the stack is down (volumes + env retained) and ra-traefik is NOT connected to its network. Ports stay reserved to this handle until deprovisioned. Resume = stack up + reconnect ra-traefik.
